title: Ukraine Police Chief Resigns After Officers Fled Kyiv Supermarket Shooting
detail: Ukraine's national police chief resigned following reports that officers at the scene of the deadly Kyiv supermarket shooting had 'disgracefully' fled during the active-shooter incident that killed six people. The resignation deepens scrutiny of security force performance amid the ongoing war with Russia.

title: Russia Claims to Have Foiled Ukraine-Linked Bomb Plot; German Woman Arrested
detail: Russia announced it foiled an alleged bomb plot linked to Ukraine, arresting a German woman in connection with the alleged operation. Russian authorities claimed the woman was recruited by Ukrainian intelligence to carry out a sabotage attack on Russian soil. Ukraine has not commented on the allegations.

media.caption: Russia claims to have foiled a Ukraine-linked bomb plot, arresting a German woman
